action_set_definitions.name: get_pending_stories
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of unprocessed news stories in the inbox to identify candidates for promotion.

action_set_definitions.name: get_story_analytics
action_set_definitions.description: Obtains real-time analytics for a specific story, including velocity and reader engagement metrics.

story_id.description: The unique identifier of the story.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hero_slot_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the current occupant of the Hero Slot and its performance metrics (current vs peak).

action_set_definitions.name: get_editorial_config
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Desk's mandatory thresholds, demotion criteria, and current shift capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: promote_to_hero
action_set_definitions.description: Elevates a specific story to the Hero Slot, displacing the current occupant.

story_id.description: The ID of the story to promote.

action_set_definitions.name: search_related_content
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the published feed or archive for supplementary content related to specific keywords for clustering.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_clustering_workflow
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns and links supplementary content IDs to a primary story to maximize recirculation.

state_description.pending_stories: A list of unproccessed news stories currently in the inbox, including ID, source, and raw urgency score.
state_description.published_feed: Stories that have been prioritized and pushed to the public feed.
state_description.trending_topics: A list of keywords currently experiencing high search volume in the simulated world.
state_description.editorial_capacity: Total available man-hours or units of effort for the current shift.
state_description.simulation_clock: The current time in the simulation, formatted as HH:MM.

headline_proposals: Babel Syllabus: Why the Protest is Spreading
